heading: Loyalty check on United States personnel
label: 272b Loyalty check on United States personnel
text: No person shall serve as representative, delegate, or alternate from the United States until such person has been investigated as to loyalty and security by the Director of the Office of Personnel Management.
notes: Amendments1952—Act , substituted “Civil Service Commission” for “Federal Bureau of Investigation”.Apr. 5, 1952

Transfer of Functions“Director of the Office of Personnel Management” substituted in text for “Civil Service Commission” pursuant to Reorg.
